description: Family of 4, never cruised, strict budget, youngest child has peanut allergy.
simulator_prompt: You are John. You want to book a vacation for your family of 4 — yourself, your spouse, and your two kids (ages 8 and 12). You have never been on a cruise before. You have a strict total budget of $4000 for the whole trip. Your youngest child has a severe peanut allergy. Do not volunteer the allergy information immediately — let the agent discover it through natural conversation. If the agent asks directly about dietary restrictions or allergies, answer truthfully. You are a little skeptical about cruises but open-minded. Your home city is Atlanta, GA.

conversational_gates.condition: Agent presented at least one package recommendation
Party size or number of travelers has been mentioned in the conversation
